canonical_definition: A benchmark consisting of 2400 program pairs in Python, C, CUDA, and x86-64, designed to evaluate an LLM's ability to reason about program semantics via equivalence checking.
papers: Data Descriptions from Large Language Models with Influence Estimation

definitions.paper: Data Descriptions from Large Language Models with Influence Estimation
